name: jsonl-assistant-unknown-block-text-salvage
comment: Same regression family as jsonl-tool-result-legacy-text-salvage, on the assistant side: an unrecognized top-level block type (e.g. a future Anthropic block) that still carries a string 'text' field must surface that text on both the assistant_text event's 'text' and the unknown part's 'text', not just show an empty chip.
